/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/reader.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/reader.dir/reader_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reader.dir/scripts/main.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/reader.dir/scripts/global-variables.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/reader.dir/scripts/reader/reader.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/reader.dir/scripts/reader/load-file.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/reader.dir/scripts/reader/page-data.cpp.o" -o reader  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::: -lmupdf /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
